meaning: adj.阴茎的,用阴茎的,影响阴茎的
examples: First of all, did you know there was a global penile length distribution map?
I counsel all of my patients about making these lifestyle changes for 'penile health.'
This kind of operation may also make penile appearance and function better for normal person.
In addition, the academy reckons that for every 909 circumcisions one man will be spared penile cancer.
Others, such as a decrease in penile cancer in later years, remain controversial.
